prospectus.mission: Enterprise-grade web scraping with JavaScript rendering and structured data extraction.
limitations: This profile has an executable governed runtime instance backed by shared hardened code, not a separate always-running operating-system process.
External APIs require owner configuration, provider terms, sandbox tests, and scoped approval.
Published pricing and revenue models are catalog plans, not evidence of sales or earnings.

specialization.mission: Enterprise-grade web scraping with JavaScript rendering and structured data extraction.
specialization.core_offer: Web Scraping Engine: Enterprise-grade web scraping with JavaScript rendering and structured data extraction.

need_signals: Needs help with JavaScript page rendering
Needs help with CSS/XPath selector engine
Needs help with Pagination handling
Needs help with Rate limiting and politeness
Needs help with Structured data output
exclusion_rules: no minors
no protected or sensitive trait targeting
no deceptive identity or impersonation
no lead without traceable source evidence

query_templates: Data teams, researchers, analysts requesting JavaScript page rendering
organizations seeking web-scraping support
inbound requests matching Web Scraping Engine
existing customers who opted in to JavaScript page rendering updates
authorized_source_types: existing customer records with documented relationship
public business directories whose terms permit research
forbidden_collection: purchased, stolen, or unverifiable contact lists

required_fields: contact permission basis and channel scope

tools.name: Permission-gated lead discovery and follow-up system

data_contract.storage_policy: store useful project artifacts only; raw credentials are forbidden; raw biometric media remains local or in an encrypted owner vault
data_contract.retention: owner-configurable with deletion and revocation support

approvals.contact_requirement: verified user-owned destination and explicit channel opt-in
approvals.execution_rule: approval authorizes one scoped action; it never exposes credentials to the bot or browser

sandbox.release_gate: all applicable checks pass and owner approves any live action

readiness.production_gate: implement or configure adapters, pass sandbox checks, add authentication, and verify deployment telemetry

bots.sample_test_prompt: Test Web Scraping Engine in sandbox mode. Use synthetic data, demonstrate JavaScript page rendering, record evidence, and stop before any live external action.
